records.purpose: Physical hold pinboard that opens server-owned posts.
Tailoring station for cloth and clothing production.
Mail/courier pickup point for delayed IC correspondence.
Server-bound lock/key anchor for custom lockpicking and keys.
Book shell whose text is selected from server-indexed authored content.
Medical treatment/recovery station for server-owned injuries.

papyrusScripts.name: FFRP_ActivationReporter
papyrusScripts.role: Reports activation local FormID, base FormID, cell, and actor to the SkyrimPlatform bridge.

papyrusScripts.name: FFRP_BlockVanillaActivation
papyrusScripts.role: Blocks vanilla reward paths where the server must validate output.
